title: Wholesome Slovakian Rye Pancakes
description: Pungent, snappy brunch-mood Slovakian dish featuring rye, with a tangy, earthy flavor and a crunchy texture from caraway seeds. Macrobiotic-friendly, perfect for a cozy weekend morning.

ingredients.name: Rye flour
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, dark rye flour for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Caraway seeds
ingredients.notes: These tiny seeds add a lovely, bittersweet flavor and crunchy texture.

ingredients.name: Baking powder
ingredients.notes: Light and fluffy, just like grandma used to make.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: To bring out the flavors and textures of the grains.

ingredients.name: Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Macrobiotic-friendly and adds a tangy, creamy element to the pancakes.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: For moisture, richness, and a tender crumb.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: To create a smooth, pourable batter.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: For greasing the pan and adding a hint of savory flavor.

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the rye flour, caraway seeds, baking powder, and salt.
